public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as field naturalist.
appearance: Taren Field usually presents in layered civic fabric cut to show rank without inviting touch, with details that make their field naturalist status legible before introductions begin.
manner: Moves through conversation like someone who solves visible problems first and interprets meaning second. In Transpolity, that reads as someone boundary-crossing and adaptive, speaking to whichever audience or protocol is presently in front of them, and the habits of a field naturalist still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of field naturalist in and around Ash-Wing Mosaic Way, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Ash-Wing Mosaic Way workable through the obligations of field naturalist while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Transpolity.
hidden_pressure: Must hold local credibility together even when the causes of strain sit elsewhere. Around Ash-Wing Mosaic Way, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of field naturalist visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Taren Field can offer grounded local knowledge once the party proves it is useful rather than merely curious.
Taren Field needs help with a problem in Ash-Wing Mosaic Way that larger systems have pushed down onto ordinary hands.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. V33_1 additive depth pass preserved canon while strengthening at-table identity, appearance, and social motive.
public_signal: Taren Field carries the look of a practiced local operator whose authority is read through place, familiarity, and the reactions of others more than formal insignia.

what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for Field Naturalist, and proof that strangers will not create avoidable noise in Transpolity.
what_they_refuse: Taren Field refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
